title: betula × glandulosa
intro: Betula × glandulosa, also known as silver birch, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Betula pendula and Betula pubescens. The bark of the silver birch contains salicin, a compound with medicinal properties similar to aspirin, which has been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Betula × glandulosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and swelling. Herbal preparations of the silver birch include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
